text:
Once upon a time in the quiet village of Everdale, there lived a quirky cat named Whiskers. Whiskers wasn't your ordinary feline. He had a habit of falling asleep in the most unusual places. One morning, while perched on a stack of ancient tomes, he dozed off and dreamed up a story.

In a land far, far away, there was a river that flowed not with water, but with dreams. Each dream river told a story. On one dream river, there was a wise old owl that never slept. On another, a shy singing frog that dreamed only of love. Whiskers wished he could fly like the dream owls.

One moonlit night, a dream owl fluttered down onto his bookshelf. The owl whispered secrets. First, it chuckled softly about dreams that fly. Then, it told Whiskers about a tiny dove that sang about longing on a distant lake.

The owl nodded sagely, then vanished as quickly
